articles.title: Phantom Lawyer first impression: Yoo Yeon-seok leads breezy legal drama
articles.description: Phantom Lawyer first impression Yoo Yeonseok leads breezy legal drama

articles.title: Why nurses in Kerala’s private hospitals went on strike | Explained
articles.description: Nurses at private hospitals across Kerala went on an ‘indefinite strike’ from March 9 to 13, led by United Nurses Association, demanding higher wages and better working conditions. Though the strike, which disrupted critical services, has been temporarily withdrawn after a Kerala High Court directive, UNA says it will relaunch the strike if there is no progress in mediation efforts

articles.title: India-US trade deal signing on hold until new tariff structure is in place, says govt
articles.description: The signing of the India-US trade deal will take place only after the new tariff framework is implemented, commerce secretary said.

articles.title: Indian airlines cancelled 4,335 flights and foreign carriers 1,187 flights due to West Asia conflict: Govt in RS
articles.description: Indian airlines cancelled 4,335 flights and foreign carriers 1,187 flights due to West Asia conflict: Govt in RS

articles.title: Fixed income investments look attractive amid market volatility, says Basant Bafna
articles.description: Investors are finding fixed income attractive amid market volatility. Basant Bafna of Mirae Asset Mutual Fund highlights appealing spreads and carry advantages.  Inflows into fixed income funds are noted.  The short-term outlook suggests curve steepening.  Medium to long-term inflation is expected to remain anchored near 4%.  Non-sovereign fixed income instruments appear particularly appealing.

topStories.title: Supreme Court refuses to intervene in a plea filed by journalist Ravi Nair against Ahmedabad Crime Branch notice
topStories.description: The court allowed the petitioner to withdraw the petition without entertaining his oral plea for protection against any coercive action for now

topStories.title: Drone strike disrupts Dubai flights as Iran continues Gulf attacks
topStories.description: Iran has sought to justify its attacks on Gulf countries, hitting civilian infrastructure as well as US assets.

topStories.title: Supreme Court expresses reluctance to intervene in 5-year law course debate
topStories.description: The court observed that legal education is a critical issue and decisions on the structure and length of professional programmes require wider consultation

topStories.title: Supreme Court quashes criminal proceedings against Ashoka University professor after Haryana refuses prosecution sanction
topStories.description: The Haryana Police had arrested professor Mahmudabad on May 18. It was alleged that his social media posts on Operation Sindoor had endangered the sovereignty and integrity of the country

topStories.title: Supreme Court asks NGO to voice concerns about mercury seepage from Bhopal gas tragedy waste’s residual ash before Madhya Pradesh High Court
topStories.description: NGO Bhopal Gas Peedith Sangharsh Sahyog Samiti urged the Supreme Court to check the filter bags and buried residual ash from the incineration of the waste to check the mercury content

topStories.title: Trump's Strait of Hormuz coalition: Australia, Japan rule out sending ships; US President looks to China, threatens NATO
topStories.description: Trump on Sunday said that his administration was in contact with seven countries regarding assistance in re-opening the Strait of Hormuz, but declined to name them. Separately, he called on China to help re-open the waterway and warned NATO of consequences if help did not arrive.

dailyNews.title: Foreigners are snapping up US homes and stealing the American dream out from under families
dailyNews.description: Foreign homebuyers purchased 78,000 American homes in just one year, many of them single-family residences that are especially desirable to young buyers.

dailyNews.title: Team USA advances to World Baseball Classic final after win over Dominican Republic
dailyNews.description: Team USA is headed back to the World Baseball Classic final, as they showcased a clutch performance against the Dominican Republic in a 2-1 thriller on Sunday night.

dailyNews.title: Former substitute teacher and boyfriend face 38 child sex charges as bond nears 9 million
dailyNews.description: A Texas substitute teacher and her boyfriend, accused of 38 child sex crimes, see bonds jump to nearly $9 million as new charges filed in shocking abuse case.

dailyNews.title: Arizona man who admitted to crucifying pastor asks for death penalty so 'we can move on with our lives'
dailyNews.description: An Arizona man accused of crucifying a pastor requested the death penalty, saying he wants the case to end quickly and has never claimed to be innocent.

dailyNews.title: 2026 NCAA Women's Basketball Tournament selections revealed
dailyNews.description: The UConn Huskies women's basketball team is undefeated and was named the No. 1 overall seed of the NCAA Women's Basketball Tournament on Sunday night.

dailyNews.title: CNN liberal panelist argues billions spent on defense should go to health insurance instead
dailyNews.description: CNN panelists debate U.S. priorities as Leigh McGowan questions whether spending on the Iran conflict should instead go toward addressing healthcare challenges at home.

dailyNews.title: Actor Wayne Brady slaps AEW wrestler during match at Revolution
dailyNews.description: Actor and comedian Wayne Brady got involved in an All Elite Wrestling match on Sunday night, slapping wrestler Shane Taylor across the face in Los Angeles.

dailyNews.title: Woman accused of fatal hit-and-run that killed 8-year-old laughs during first court appearance
dailyNews.description: A Florida woman accused in a fatal hit-and-run was seen laughing during a court hearing as the judge read charges for an 8-year-old boy's death in the Winter Haven crash incident.

dailyNews.title: Penn's TJ Power takes advantage of massive Yale blunder to punch ticket to March Madness
dailyNews.description: Penn stunned Yale, 88-84, in overtime to claim the Ivy League title after the Bulldogs' costly blunder that allowed the Quakers a chance to tie the game late.

dailyNews.title: 2026 Oscars: Winners and losers
dailyNews.description: A comprehensive roundup of the 98th Academy Awards, including the full list of nominees and winners.

dailyNews.title: Tennessee batter celebrates go-ahead homer prematurely as Georgia outfielder makes incredible catch
dailyNews.description: The Georgia Bulldogs escaped with a win over the Tennessee Volunteers on Sunday as Cole Johnson robbed Stone Lawless' go-ahead home run.

topStories.description: As the conflict with Iran expands and intensifies, President Trump’s options — to fight on, or to move toward declaring victory and pulling back — both carry deeply problematic consequences.

topStories.description: The planned vote to close the center for renovations was listed on an agenda circulated to the center’s board of trustees on Sunday, less than a day before the meeting.

topStories.title: Is Latin America Ready to Abandon Cuba?
topStories.description: Latin America’s left saw Cuba as its lodestar. Now leaders across the spectrum are hesitant to aid a nation in the Trump administration’s cross hairs.

dailyNews.description: TSA officers faced their first full missed paycheck Friday.

dailyNews.description: The U.S. strikes on Kharg Island and Trump's threat to hit Iran's oil infrastructure mark a major escalation in the war, according to JPMorgan.

dailyNews.title: 'We will remember': Trump warns countries to help secure Strait of Hormuz as shipping stalls
dailyNews.description: Trump's comments come after he called on several countries to send warships so as to secure the critical waterway

dailyNews.title: Trump’s warning over Kharg Island raises the stakes for Iran’s oil exports
dailyNews.description: Trump's decision to order strikes on Kharg Island has pushed one of the world's most critical oil hubs into the center of the escalating U.S.-Iran conflict.

dailyNews.title: Trump signals possible delay to Beijing summit as U.S. pressures China to help reopen Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: The remarks came as Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent met his Chinese counterpart He Lifeng in Paris, paving the way for the summit scheduled for late March.

dailyNews.title: China talks up oil sufficiency as Trump seeks Beijing's help on securing Hormuz energy route
dailyNews.description: The statistics bureau said that China's energy supply is "relatively strong," while announcing an uptick in domestic production.

dailyNews.title: Trump weighing options to strike Iran's critical oil hub, UN Ambassador Waltz says
dailyNews.description: Israel says it has killed two senior Iranian intelligence officials as oil loading reportedly resumes in the UAE's Fujairah port following a fire.

dailyNews.title: Democrats blast FCC Chair Carr's broadcast license threats as anti-First Amendment, 'totalitarian'
dailyNews.description: Carr on Saturday blasted broadcasters shortly after President Donald Trump called reports that Iran struck five U.S. tanker planes "fake news."

dailyNews.title: Trump calls for other nations to help reopen Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s call for help to reopen the Strait of Hormuz has so far gone unanswered. On Truth Social, the president listed China, France, Japan, South Korea, the U.K. as countries he hopes would help. It comes as Trump tells NBC News that Iran is ready to negotiate a ceasefire. NBC News’ Raf Sanchez has the latest.

dailyNews.title: Trump says there’s been ‘total obliteration’ of Iran militarily
dailyNews.description: President Trump told NBC News’ Kristen Welker in a nearly half hour phone conversation that Iran has been “militarily defeated” and he believes other countries will help to secure passage through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'
dailyNews.description: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'
